diagrams.title: Frame Allocation Strategies Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy and relationships between different frame allocation strategies
diagrams.purpose: Understanding classification of allocation strategies and their relationships

diagrams.title: Global vs Local Replacement Flow
diagrams.description: Decision flowchart showing how page replacement differs between global and local approaches
elements: Global: Search all frames in system
Local: Search only process allocated frames
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the replacement decision process for both approaches

diagrams.title: Working Set Model Concept
diagrams.description: Diagram showing relationship between allocated frames, working set window, and page faults over time
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how working set changes and its relationship to allocated frames
